title: AEW adds two title matches to Collision lineup
summary: AEW adds two title matches to Collision lineup
imageAlt: AEW adds two title matches to Collision lineup
aiSummary: AEW adds two title matches to Collision lineup

whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.
fullArticle:
AEW has added two title matches to the lineup for Collision.

Saturday’s episode will take place live from the Berglund Center in Roanoke, Virginia.

On Thursday, AEW confirmed that Mike Bailey will challenge Mark Davis for the AEW National Championship on the show. Bailey cut a promo on Dynamite, challenging Davis for the match.

Also announced for Saturday is Harley Cameron challenging Hikaru Shida for the TBS Championship.

“This Saturday, 7/11! Three Title Matches are just the start of what you can expect on Saturday #AEWCollision!”

Previously announced for Collision is the winner of Bandido vs. Bryan Keith on tonight’s Ring of Honor episode defending the ROH World Championship against Katsuyori Shibata.
